ISO_27001_A.5.1.source_control_text: A set of policies for information security shall be defined, approved by management.

ISO_27001_A.5.2.source_control_text: All information security responsibilities shall be defined and allocated.
ISO_27001_A.5.2.target_control_title: Roles and responsibilities for cybersecurity risk management

ISO_27001_A.6.1.source_control_text: Background verification checks on all candidates for employment shall be carried out.
ISO_27001_A.6.1.target_control_title: Identities and credentials for authorized users are managed
ISO_27001_A.6.1.gap_description: Partial coverage — screening is broader than credential management

ISO_27001_A.8.1.source_control_text: Information stored on or accessible via user endpoint devices shall be protected.

ISO_27001_A.8.2.source_control_text: The allocation and use of privileged access rights shall be restricted and managed.
ISO_27001_A.8.2.target_control_title: Access permissions and authorizations are managed

ISO_27001_A.8.3.source_control_text: Access to information and application system functions shall be restricted.
ISO_27001_A.8.3.target_control_title: Users, services, and hardware are authenticated

ISO_27001_A.8.4.source_control_text: Read and write access to source code shall be appropriately managed.
ISO_27001_A.8.4.target_control_title: The confidentiality and integrity of data-at-rest are protected
ISO_27001_A.8.4.gap_description: Partial — source code is a specific type of data at rest

ISO_27001_A.8.5.source_control_text: Secure authentication technologies and procedures shall be implemented.
ISO_27001_A.8.5.target_control_title: Users, services, and hardware are authenticated

ISO_27001_A.8.6.source_control_text: The use of resources shall be monitored and adjusted in line with capacity requirements.
ISO_27001_A.8.6.target_control_title: Log records are generated to enable monitoring
ISO_27001_A.8.6.gap_description: Partial — capacity management is broader than log monitoring

ISO_27001_A.8.7.source_control_text: Protection against malware shall be implemented and supported by appropriate user awareness.
ISO_27001_A.8.7.target_control_title: Computing hardware and software are monitored
